videos.title: This Deck of Legends Won Way More Than It Should
videos.description:
Is the meta too fast for a deck full of Legends? Yes ...but this deck pulled out a chunk of hilarious victories that we probably shouldn't have won.

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/single-scoop-this-deck-of-legends-won-way-more-than-it-should
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7331338#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/s4yrb
◼ Purchase this deck (Magic Online): http://mtg.fish/HNEsD

videos.title: I Had a Very Expensive Random Encounter... | Much Abrew
videos.description:
We played a $20 budget build of Random Encounter a couple of months ago, but what if your Random Encounter budget was limitless?

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

videos.title: Squall Out Equipments
videos.description:
Squall, SeeD Mercenary itself doesn't need to attack to get value! On top of that, with so many people playing artifact answers, its nice to reoccur them with Squall as well!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish
